'''Enara''' was a woman who lived in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], either baseline [[Human/Legends|Human]] or perhaps [[Andalese]]. In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], she was captured by the [[Yevetha]] and held on the [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Pride of Yevetha'']] during the [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]].

She claimed to be a worker from the [[pholikite]] mines of the [[Morath]] colony on [[Elcorth]], but in fact she was a [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] adept from [[J't'p'tan]].

As such, she was instrumental in the escape of the survivors of the Purge. All the other "captives" aboard the ship were in fact illusions, conjured by her [[White Current/Legends|White Current]] training to prevent the Yevetha from realizing that the real hostages had been rescued by the ''[[Star Morning]]''.

When [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] came to rescue [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], she hid the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] until Chewbacca and [[Lumpawaroo/Legends|Lumpawaroo]] could come and save Han. She held the illusion even until after the ''Falcon's'' departure.
